What we build for brokerages
01

WhatsApp chatbot & listings bot

Answers queries, quotes prices, books viewings 24/7 — directly from your Bayut & PropertyFinder feed.

Live in 2 weeks
02

Automated lead follow-up

Instant WhatsApp the moment a lead comes in. Email sequences at day 1, 3, 7. Agents only step in when someone replies.

Live in 2 weeks
03

AI document generator

Fill one form — get a fully formatted MOU, offer letter, or tenancy contract PDF in 10 seconds.

Live in 3–4 weeks
04

Brokerage performance dashboard

Live pipeline in AED, per-agent conversion, portal ROI — on your phone, real time, no spreadsheets.

Real-time · Mobile
Free tool — try it now
Live tool · Free · No sign-up

Brokerage Revenue Analyzer

Answer 9 questions about your brokerage. Get a precise AED revenue leakage figure and an AI-written diagnosis — in under 3 minutes.

Case studies
Case study · CRM Automation

Lead pipeline in 12 days

18 minavg lead responsewas 4+ hours
47%lead-to-viewing ratewas 12%
We used to lose leads before we even knew they existed. Now every inquiry gets a response in minutes.
Case study · WhatsApp Bot

Viewings on autopilot

60%bookings without agent input
4.8★client satisfaction from week one
The bot handles everything until someone is ready to sign. Our agents only talk to serious buyers now.
Case study · Analytics

22% revenue growth in Q1

AED 18Ksaved monthly on wasted ad spend
+30%top-agent productivity after dashboards went live
We finally know which agents and areas to double down on. This paid for itself in the first month.
What a typical Dubai brokerage gains in 90 days
Month 1

Zero cold leads

CRM automation live, WhatsApp follow-up running. Every lead gets a response in under 90 seconds. Your team stops chasing and starts closing.

Month 2

Full pipeline visibility

Performance dashboard live. Portal ROI tracked per listing. Every agent knows their conversion rate. Management has real numbers, not guesses.

Month 3

Admin eliminated

AI document generator deployed. MOUs, offer letters, tenancy contracts generated in 10 seconds. 10+ hours of admin per agent per week — gone.

Specifically built for the Dubai market
Bayut & PropertyFinder integration

Listings auto-sync. Leads captured directly from both portals into your CRM. No manual export, no missed inquiries.

DLD transaction data

Market intelligence pulled from Dubai Land Department data. Price trends, transaction volumes, area comparisons — built into your dashboard.

Multilingual AI responses

Arabic, English, Russian, and Chinese. Your chatbot and follow-up sequences respond in the language your lead used. No manual translation.

AED-denominated reporting

All dashboards, revenue figures, and KPIs shown in AED. Commission splits, pipeline value, portal ROI — in your currency.

RERA compliance documents

MOU templates, Form A/B/F, tenancy contracts — pre-loaded, auto-filled from lead data, RERA-compliant. Ready in seconds.

What could your brokerage look like in 90 days?

Book a free 30-minute discovery call. No commitment — just a clear picture of what is possible.
